name: The City Pub Group plc
summary: The City Pub Group plc, together with its subsidiaries, owns, operates, and manages an estate of pubs. The company's pub estate comprises 48 free houses located primarily in London, Cathedral cities, and market towns. Its portfolio primarily consists of freehold and managed pubs that provide a range of drinks and food tailored for its pubs' customers. The City Pub Group plc sells craft ales, craft spirits, and independent coffee at its pubs to residents, office workers, students, tourists, and shoppers. The company was formerly known as The City Pub Company (East) PLC and changed its name to The City Pub Group plc in November 2017. The City Pub Group plc was founded in 2011 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
